description: A recurring work-burnout arc across six turns. Later turns should surface the earlier work entries from memory, showing the conversation builds on its own history.

turns.entry: My manager piled three new deadlines on me today and I stayed late at the office again. I am completely burned out.
Another late night at work. The deadlines keep coming and my manager does not seem to notice how much I am carrying.
I skipped lunch to hit a deadline and felt my chest tighten. This workload is not sustainable.
My manager added yet another project on top of the deadlines. I am exhausted and resentful about the workload.
Stayed at the office past nine again finishing a project. The burnout from all these work deadlines is catching up with me.
I told my manager the workload and deadlines are too much. Saying it out loud after weeks of late nights felt like a small relief.
